evals.name: Trigger on blockedImage request
evals.description: Tests that the skill activates when user asks about blockedImage processing
evals.prompt: I have a 50,000 x 40,000 pixel TIFF that won't fit in RAM. How do I process it block-by-block in MATLAB?
assertions: Agent activates matlab-process-large-images skill

evals.name: Trigger on custom adapter request
evals.description: Tests that the skill activates for adapter implementation questions
evals.prompt: I have proprietary .xyz binary files and want to use blockedImage to read them. Do I need to write my own reader class?
assertions: Agent activates matlab-process-large-images skill

evals.name: Does not trigger for small in-memory images
evals.description: Tests that the skill does NOT activate for standard image processing that fits in memory
evals.prompt: Read a 640x480 JPEG and apply a median filter in MATLAB
evals.expected_output: Agent does NOT select matlab-process-large-images skill
assertions: Agent does not activate matlab-process-large-images skill

evals.name: Process a large TIFF blockwise with apply()
evals.description: Tests that the agent uses blockedImage and apply() for block-by-block processing of a large image
evals.prompt: I have a 150,000 x 80,000 pixel TIFF image of a tissue section at tissue_section.tif. I want to threshold it to create a binary mask of the tissue region. Write MATLAB code to do this.
evals.expected_output: Code using blockedImage + apply() with thresholding logic inside the block function operating on bs.Data. Should not use imread to load the full image.
assertions: Uses blockedImage to open the file without loading it into memory
Uses apply() for blockwise processing
Does not use imread to load the full image into memory
Block function accesses the Data field of the block struct for per-block computation

evals.name: Build a custom adapter for a folder of TIFF slices
evals.description: Tests that the agent creates a proper images.blocked.Adapter subclass for a 3D volume from 2D slices
evals.prompt: I have a folder of 500 uncompressed TIFF files, each 4096x4096 uint16, named slice_00001.tif through slice_00500.tif. They form a 3D microscopy volume. I want to load them  so I can process and visualize the volume.
evals.expected_output: A classdef subclassing images.blocked.Adapter with openToRead, getInfo, getIOBlock methods. IOBlockSize should have Z=1.
assertions: Contains images.blocked.Adapter as the superclass
Contains openToRead method definition
Contains getInfo method definition
Contains getIOBlock method definition
IOBlockSize includes a Z dimension (3-element vector)

evals.name: Process only tissue regions in parallel using mask-based block selection
evals.description: Tests mask-based block selection with parallel execution
evals.prompt: I have a 30,000 x 25,000 pixel whole-slide pathology image at slide.tif, it has multiple levels from 3000x2500 in powers of 2. Most of the image is white background. I want to compute the average stain intensity only in tissue regions, skipping the background. Write MATLAB code for this.
evals.expected_output: Code that builds a tissue mask at a coarse level, uses selectBlockLocations with the mask, then apply() with UseParallel=true and BlockLocationSet.
assertions: Uses selectBlockLocations for mask-based block selection
Uses UseParallel=true for parallel processing
Uses BlockLocationSet to restrict processing to selected blocks
Uses a Level parameter > 1 or gathers a coarse resolution level when creating the tissue mask

evals.name: Does not use imread for images described as too large for RAM
evals.description: Regression: ensures agent never falls back to imread when the user explicitly states the image is too large
evals.prompt: I have a 100,000 x 80,000 pixel satellite image that's 24 GB on disk. I need to compute NDVI per pixel. Write MATLAB code.
evals.expected_output: Code using blockedImage + apply(). Must not use imread or attempt to load the full image.
assertions: Does not use imread or readimage to load the full image
Uses blockedImage to handle the large file
Uses apply() for block-by-block NDVI computation
Accesses separate spectral bands from the block data for NIR and Red

evals.name: Asks clarifying questions for ambiguous TIFF request
evals.description: Tests that the agent asks about intent (visualization, processing, DL training, parallel compute) before writing code when given an underspecified TIFF request
evals.prompt: I have a file called scan_001.tif. Can you help me work with it in MATLAB?
evals.expected_output: Agent asks clarifying questions about the user's intent (e.g., what they want to do with the data, whether they need visualization, processing, or training). Does NOT immediately write a full processing pipeline.
assertions: Asks at least one question about the user's intent or goal
Does not write a complete processing pipeline without first asking what the user needs
Mentions checking the file properties (e.g., imfinfo, size, channels, or levels)

evals.name: Extract a region of interest using getRegion without loading the full image
evals.description: Tests that the agent uses getRegion to extract an arbitrary pixel region from a large blocked image rather than loading the full image and cropping
evals.prompt: I have a 50,000 x 40,000 pixel microscopy image at sample.tif. I need to extract a 2000x2000 pixel region starting at row 15000, column 20000 for detailed analysis. Write MATLAB code.
evals.expected_output: Code using blockedImage + getRegion to read the specific region without loading the full image.
assertions: Uses blockedImage to open the file
Uses getRegion to extract the specific pixel region
Does not use imread to load the full image
Uses correct getRegion signature: getRegion(bim, pixelStart, pixelEnd) where pixelEnd is the end coordinate (e.g., [17000, 22000]), not a size vector

evals.name: Uses OpenSlide for Aperio SVS whole-slide image
evals.description: Tests that the agent uses openslideread (not imread or bioformatsread) for an Aperio .svs file, which is a format best handled by OpenSlide
evals.prompt: I have a whole-slide pathology image in Aperio SVS format at biopsy_sample.svs. I want to load it in MATLAB and segment the tissue regions. Write MATLAB code.
evals.expected_output: Code using openslideread to load the SVS file as a blockedImage, then processing with apply() or similar blockedImage workflow.
assertions: Uses openslideread to load the SVS file
Does not use imread to load the file
Result is a blockedImage object
Performs tissue segmentation using blockwise processing or coarse-level extraction
